title: Community Workbench SDK
description: The Community Workbench SDK enables developers and researchers to build, extend, and integrate custom analytical modules and study components into the Parthenon platform. It provides programmatic access to platform services, study packaging tools, and collaborative development workflows.
tips: Review the SDK documentation and example modules before beginning development to understand the expected component structure and API conventions.
Use the Study Packages framework in conjunction with the SDK to ensure custom modules are exportable and reproducible.
Test custom SDK modules against a development data source before deploying to production environments.
Follow platform versioning guidelines when publishing SDK extensions to maintain compatibility across Parthenon upgrades.
Engage with the community through Commons to share SDK modules and incorporate feedback from collaborating institutions.
